The chasm is about six feet across and t: There is a dark rope stretched tautly across the path.  It can easily be avoided by stepping over it.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 有條黑繩子繃得很緊，橫跨小徑。你可以輕易地跨過去。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The bridge looks sturdy resting on its pole across the chasm.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 木橋靠著一根柱子跨越峽谷，看起來很牢固。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The bridge looks sturdy resting on its poles across the chasm.  There is a sign on it which reads, "Cross Here".
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 木橋靠著兩根柱子跨越峽谷，看起來\n很牢固。橋上有張告示寫著「在此\n渡過」。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Sturdy looking bridge with two support poles across the chasm.  A sign that reads: "Cross Here" is atop the bridge.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 牢固的木橋有兩根支柱橫跨峽谷。\n橋頂上有張告示寫著「在此渡過」。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: There are two bridges which cross the chasm.
The sacks seem to be full of grain.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 麻袋看起來裝滿了穀物。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The barrels look like empty wine casks.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 木桶看起來像空的葡萄酒桶。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Nothing but cobwebs.
You see a rope tautly strung about 6 inches off the floor.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你看到繩子繃得很緊，離地板約 6 吋。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Don't -- you'll get dizzy.
The building to the north has a window and a single door.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 北邊的建築有一扇窗和一扇門。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You can see the fortress wall and the open gate.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你可以看到城牆和敞開的大門。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You can see the fortress wall and the closed gate.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你可以看到城牆和關閉的大門。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You're not near any window
Yep, it's a door all right
An empty cabinet.
You don't have much time to look at toys.
The cabinet seems to have some kind of hasp.
Get close for a good look.
The rugs are too big to put into your backpack and too heavy to carry around.  You do notice a pit trap under the spread-out carpet.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 地毯太大放不進背包，也太重抬\n不動。你注意到攤開的地毯下有個\n陷阱。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The rope is securely fastened and is pretty useless anyway.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 繩子繫得很牢，不過也沒什麼用。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Your life is in grave danger and you want to play with toys?  What kind of hero are you?.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你生命危在旦夕還想玩玩具？你\n算什麼英雄？

The chasm is about six feet across and t: It's already open.
You're not close enough
The door is closed.
You thought that the Troll concealed some of its treasure in that thick beard, but you didn't find any there.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你以為巨魔把寶藏藏在那濃密的鬍子\n裡，但你什麼都沒找到。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Points Available
TAB to move around,\nArrows to adjust values.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 按 TAB 移動，\n按方向鍵調整數值。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Are you sure you want to start over?

No rest for the weary.  Something's after you!
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 疲憊者無寧日。有什麼東西追著你！

The chasm is about six feet across and t: All the excitement of the battle has caused you to lose your appetite.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 戰鬥的興奮讓你沒了食欲。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You only think you can smell that.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你只是以為你聞到那種味道。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Cheetaur claws are very rare except on Cheetaurs.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 獵豹人的爪子除了在獵豹人身上\n外很少見。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You already have the Troll's beard.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你已經有巨魔的鬍子了。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: That's not easy to do, especially since this is not a Troll.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 那不容易做到，尤其是因為這不是\n巨魔。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You look all around, but you can't find any of those.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你四處看看，但你找不到那種東西。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: There is nothing here to fight.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 這裡沒有可以戰鬥的東西。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Maybe that creature is magical.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 也許那生物是魔法造物。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Hero Status
Enemy Status
You cannot make the arcane gestures to cast spells while carrying a shield.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你拿著盾牌時無法做出咒語的奧秘\n手勢。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: This might not be the best time for practicing non-combat spells.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 現在可能不是練習非戰鬥法術的最\n好時機。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Go ahead!
You're too close.
You're too busy!
You ARE!
You're not fighting, you're PRACTICING!
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你不是在戰鬥，你是在練習！

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Why would you want to do that?
Do not ramble, my friend
Will you pay?
Will you fight?
I'm sorry.  Since you have no skill in parrying blows, you would receive no benefit from my instruction.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「我很遺憾。由於你沒有招架的\n技能，你從我的指導中得不到任何\n好處。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The weapon master carries a blunted practice sword, in the belief that students retain more of their learning if they survive the practice sessions.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 武器師傅拿著一把鈍的練習劍，因為\n他相信學生如果在練習中活下來會保\n留更多知識。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Please don't bore me, young adventurer.  Ask me about something interesting to me.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「請別讓我感到厭倦，年輕的冒險\n家。問我一些我感興趣的事。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Fighting is both an art and a skill.
It is a skill in the use of the muscle strength and agility's control.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「這是肌肉力量和敏捷控制的技能。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: It is an art in the out-witting and out-maneuvering of the opponent.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「這是以聰慧應對和機動迴避對手\n的藝術。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: I am, of course, a most skilled artist.
Do you fight?
If you were a swordsman skilled in both attack and parry, we could have had a practice bout.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「如果你是個攻防兼備的劍客，我們\n就可以來一場練習比賽。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: I am the Weapon Master.
You will find them very skilled at fighting.  After all, I am the one who trains all of the guards at this castle.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「你會發現他們戰鬥能力很強。畢竟，\n我就是訓練這座城堡所有衛兵的人。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The Baron had the wisdom to recognize greatness when I presented myself.  Thus he made me Weapon Master.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「男爵有遠見認出我的偉大。因此他\n讓我做了武器師傅。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The Baronet had some minor talent with weapons, but he was too impatient.  If he had but listened and learned what I teach, he would never have been lost.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「少爺在武器上有些小才能，但他太\n沒耐心了。如果他肯聽課和學習我的\n教誨，就不會迷失。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: I never use a shield or armor under most circumstances.  It only gets in the way of my agility and dodging ability.  It is best used by those who are strong, but not swift or agile.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「大多數時候我不用盾牌或盔甲。它\n只會妨礙我的敏捷和閃避能力。它最\n適合那些強壯但不敏捷的人用。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: En garde! shouts the Weapon Master...
And the lesson begins!
Enough! cries the Weapon Master.
Be more aware of the angle with which your weapon approaches your opponent.  The thrust bites quick and deep, but the swing will do more damage if it connects.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「要更留意你的武器朝向對手的角\n度。刺擊又快又深，但揮擊如果擊中\n會造成更多傷害。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The art of dancing would be a good skill for you to practice, my friend.  The balance of the body over the rapidly moving feet has won many a contest.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「舞蹈藝術對你是個好技能，朋友。\n身體在快速移動雙腳上的平衡贏得過\n許多比賽。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Put your attention to the control of your legs when you duck a swing.  Your springiness makes you seem to bounce, and a good opponent (like myself) will always take advantage of the opening.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「當你躲開揮擊時，注意腿的控制。\n你的彈性讓你看起來在彈跳，好對手\n（像我一樣）總是會利用空隙。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You're mad as heck, and you just won't take it anymore.  As a matter of fact, you CAN'T take it anymore.  Start over, and remember to keep up your strength and health.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你怒火中燒，再也受不了了。事實上，\n你根本受不了了。重新開始，記得保持\n體力和生命力。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: NOT NOW!!
You're mad as heck, and you just won't take it anymore.  As a matter of fact, you CAN'T take it anymore.  Keep up your strength and health and try again.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你怒火中燒，再也受不了了。事實上，\n你根本受不了了。保持體力和生命力，\n再試一次。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: It's a little sign that reads: "Do not read this sign under any circumstances.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 這是個小告示寫著：「在任何情況下\n都不要讀這張告示。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: There's an ECHO IN HERE...Echo In Here...echo in here...
This time the joke fell flat.  That was a truly dirty trick.  Too bad you won't have a chance to get even...or will you?
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 這次笑話沒成功。那真是個骯髒的把\n戲。太遺憾了你沒機會報仇…或者你有？

The chasm is about six feet across and t: What a miserable experience!
Oops!  You thought this door led SOMEWHERE!
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 哎呀！你以為這扇門通往某個地方！

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The bright smell of fresh herbs mingles with the aroma of wood smoke as you near a hut by the side of the road.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 當你靠近路邊的小屋時，新鮮草藥的\n清香與木煙的香氣混合在一起。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Your bug doesn't have any hands.  This makes throwing anything out of the question.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你的蟲子沒有手。這使得投擲任何\n東西都是不可能的。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Looks like all you can do is wriggle.
Better concentrate on the game.
Ach du lieber
Well I'll huff, and I'll puff, and I'll smash the gate down.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「好吧，我要深吸氣，鼓起勁，砸開\n大門。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Boy that feels good.
'DING DING DING DING....' \n"Well, maybe the brigands aren't such inhospitable creatures after all."
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 『叮叮叮叮…』\n「也許山賊並不是那麼不好客的生\n物。」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: The brigands have an even temperament...all bad!   You seem to have a knack for doing the wrong thing.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 山賊的脾氣很平穩…全都是壞！你似\n乎很會做錯事。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: From somewhere upstairs, you hear the Sheriff shout: "Otto!".
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你聽到樓上某處治安官喊著：「奧圖\n！」。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: It's hard to be a hero when you're sitting in a jail cell.  The Sheriff apologized for your broken arm, but he did warn you (didn't he?) that Otto was only partly trained.  In the future, you'll probably be more careful when you're robbing someone.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。:
坐在牢房裡很難成為英雄。治安官為
你折斷的手臂道歉，但他確實警告過
你（不是嗎？）奧圖只經過部分訓練。
將來，你搶劫別人時可能會更小心。

The chasm is about six feet across and t: You never dreamed a feather pillow could be so HARD!  Or was it the floor?  You also didn't realize how hard it is for a thief to be a Hero.  The Thief of Baghdad should have this kind of luck!
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 你從沒想到羽毛枕頭會這麼硬！或者\n是地板？你也沒意識到盜賊成為英雄\n有多難。巴格達大盜應該有這樣的運氣！

The chasm is about six feet across and t: Now, Oh-Soon-To-Be-Supper...\nI don't suppose you have a name?"
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 嗯，即將成為晚餐…\n我猜你沒名字吧？

The chasm is about six feet across and t: But I do have a need for a brave fool.  Are you brave?
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。: 「但我確實需要一個勇敢的傻瓜。\n你勇敢嗎？」

The chasm is about six feet across and t:
Hear what I say
And hear me right:
Mandrake must be pulled
At precisely Midnight!
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。:
「聽我言
聽我說：
曼德拉草必被拔起
午夜時分！」

The chasm is about six feet across and t:
This I tell you
And this I say:
Return with the root
Ere the break of next day.
峽谷寬約六呎，深約十呎。:
「這是我告訴你
這是我要說的：
帶著根回來
天亮前！」

The chasm is about six feet across and t: So...Go!
Take care!
Say "Hi!" to the Dryad for us!
Bye bye!  See ya!
Kiss a tree for me!
Ooh, looky.  A human!
What's it doing here?
